# Creating connections,   
changing futures
Connecting startups with fractional experts
We empower startups and fractional experts to thrive in a changing world
## How can  
we help?
### Connectd for Fractional
### Share your experience,   
expand your skillset
Your expertise is in demand. By connecting with scaling startups, you can support their growth while expanding your network, enhancing your CV, and creating a fractional career. 
[ Find Out More ](https://www.connectd.com/fractional) [](https://www.connectd.com/fractional)
### Connectd for Startups
### Solve your challenges,   
scale your business
Knowledge drives growth. With support from fractional experts, board advisors and non-executives, you can access the insights, experience, and guidance you need to achieve your ambitions.
[ Find Out More ](https://www.connectd.com/startups) [](https://www.connectd.com/startups)
## Connectd For Experts
### [Fractional Execs](https://www.connectd.com/#role-slide-1)
### [Board Advisors](https://www.connectd.com/#role-slide-2)
### [Non-Executives](https://www.connectd.com/#role-slide-3)
Build a flexible, future-ready career by applying your expertise across high-growth companies. Drive strategic and operational success, diversifying your impact and income without full-time commitments.
Step into strategic influence, applying your expertise beyond the day-to-day to guide high-growth companies at board level. Broaden your experience, boost your profile, and shape a future on your own terms.
Harness your expertise to provide trusted strategic advice and guidance - and build your reputation. Sharpen your hard skills in governance, risk, and strategy, letting you shape big decisions and build influence without the day-to-day pressure.
01 02 03
![](https://www.connectd.com/uploads/Images/_900x1200_crop_center-center_90_none/317/Fractional.webp) ![](https://www.connectd.com/uploads/Images/_900x1200_crop_center-center_90_none/315/Advisors.webp) ![](https://www.connectd.com/uploads/Images/_900x1200_crop_center-center_90_none/316/Non-Execs.webp)
## A truly global platform
The right connection can change everything — and we’ve got 60+ countries worth of them. Connectd brings the world’s startups, scaleups and experts together into one powerful platform — ready when  
you are
![](https://www.connectd.com/uploads/Flags/it.svg) ![](https://www.connectd.com/uploads/Flags/jp.svg) ![](https://www.connectd.com/uploads/Flags/es.svg) ![](https://www.connectd.com/uploads/Flags/sh.svg) ![](https://www.connectd.com/uploads/Flags/us.svg) ![](https://www.connectd.com/uploads/Flags/fr.svg) ![](https://www.connectd.com/uploads/Flags/sa.svg) ![](https://www.connectd.com/uploads/Flags/de.svg) ![](https://www.connectd.com/uploads/Flags/in.svg) ![](https://www.connectd.com/uploads/Flags/se.svg) ![](https://www.connectd.com/uploads/Flags/au.svg) ![](https://www.connectd.com/uploads/Flags/ca.svg)
## Connectd For Startups
The right experts can supercharge your business. No matter whether you need incremental operational improvements, marketing that cuts through the crowd, or a technical overhaul, we can connect you with experts who want to make a difference and have the experience to have an immediate impact.
## Hear from our members
![](https://www.connectd.com/uploads/Logos/Trustpilot_Logo.svg)
> Connectd is an outstanding platform that makes networking between startups, advisors seamless and efficient. As a founder, I found the tools and insights incredibly helpful in preparing for investment rounds and connecting with the right people.
> The platform is well-designed, easy to navigate, and filled with high-quality opportunities. What truly sets Connectd apart is the level of support they provide—both in terms of platform guidance and strategic advice. If you're looking to grow your startup or expand your investment portfolio, Connectd is a game-changer!
Ali Fawze
Founder
> I've had – and continue to have – a fantastic experience with Connectd. The course was insightful and well-structured, providing valuable knowledge, and the networking events have been excellent. The platform does a great job of connecting founders and advisors in a meaningful way.
> I'm about to start a placement soon, which speaks volumes about how effective Connectd is in creating real opportunities. 
> If you're looking for networking, learning, and career opportunities in the startup space, I highly recommend Connectd.
Jagjit Banwait
Board Advisor
> The two advisors that we have connected with through the platform are exceptional. The package of support and the value that we are receiving is outstanding. I would recommend Connectd wholeheartedly.
Stuart Evans
Founder
> Connectd has been an outstanding platform for securing board and advisory positions. Their personalized approach, industry insights, and extensive network make them a standout service for professionals seeking leadership opportunities.
> I highly recommend Connectd to anyone looking to transition into non-executive, board, or advisory roles—a truly professional and results-driven service!
Deborah Hall
Fractional Executive
> Connectd has been a game-changer for MySensei. Finding the right Non-Executive Directors (NEDs) can be a challenge, but thanks to their platform and expertise, we now have a strong advisory team from key business functions. This has given us a significant strategic advantage, ensuring our business decisions are well-informed and aligned across these key areas.
> If you're looking to strengthen your advisory board with the right expertise, I highly recommend Connectd. Their process is efficient, their network is impressive, and the impact on our business has been profound.
Denise Creisson
Founder
